flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at South Arkansas College fell 55% between 2007 and 2010 (20.6% → 9.3%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at South Arkansas College fell 52% between 2009 and 2010 (10.5% → 5.0%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at South Arkansas College rose 23% between 2021 and 2024 ($2.7k → $3.3k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at South Arkansas College rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.8k → $5.5k).
